title: Introduce yourself
prompt: Write a short introduction about yourself in Danish.

payload.stimulus: Skriv en kort tekst om dig selv: dit navn, din alder, og hvor du bor.
criteria: States name, age, and place of living in Danish
Uses simple present-tense sentences (jeg hedder, jeg er, jeg bor)
Spelling and word order are mostly correct

title: Shopping note
prompt: Write a short shopping list note to your family.

payload.stimulus: Skriv en kort besked til din familie med tre til fire ting, de skal købe i supermarkedet.
criteria: Lists three to four everyday food or household items in Danish
Uses correct nouns and simple connecting words (og)
Message is clear and easy to understand

title: Describe your family
prompt: Write a few sentences about your family.

payload.stimulus: Skriv om din familie: hvem bor du sammen med, og hvad hedder de?
criteria: Names at least two family members and their relationship (mor, far, bror, søster)
Uses possessive words correctly (min, mit)
Sentences are complete and understandable

title: Invite a friend for coffee
prompt: Write a short message inviting a friend for coffee.

payload.stimulus: Skriv en kort besked til en ven. Inviter vennen på kaffe og skriv hvornår og hvor.
criteria: Includes an invitation, a day or time, and a place
Uses a polite phrase (vil du, kan du)
Message reads naturally for a friend

title: My daily routine
prompt: Write about what you do on a normal day.

payload.stimulus: Skriv om din dag: hvad gør du om morgenen, om eftermiddagen og om aftenen?
criteria: Describes at least three parts of the day in Danish
Uses time words (om morgenen, klokken, så)
Verbs are used correctly in the present tense

title: The weather today
prompt: Write a few sentences about the weather today.

payload.stimulus: Skriv om vejret i dag, og skriv hvad du tager på.
criteria: Describes the weather with at least two adjectives (koldt, solrigt, regnfuldt)
Mentions a piece of clothing suitable for the weather
Sentences are grammatically simple and clear

title: Message to the teacher
prompt: Write a short message to your teacher that you are sick today.

payload.stimulus: Skriv en kort besked til din lærer. Fortæl, at du er syg og ikke kommer i skole i dag.
criteria: States clearly that the writer is sick and cannot come
Uses a greeting and a closing (Hej, Venlig hilsen)
Message is polite and understandable

title: My home
prompt: Write a few sentences describing where you live.

payload.stimulus: Skriv om dit hjem: bor du i et hus eller en lejlighed, og hvilke rum har du?
criteria: Says whether it is a house or apartment and lists some rooms
Uses there-is/there-are structures (der er)
Includes a few descriptive words (stort, lille, nyt)

title: Present yourself
prompt: Introduce yourself out loud in Danish.

payload.stimulus: Fortæl om dig selv: dit navn, din alder, hvor du bor, og hvor du kommer fra.
criteria: Gives name, age, and where they live and come from
Speaks in clear, simple full sentences
Pronunciation is understandable

title: Talk about your family
prompt: Talk about your family out loud.

payload.stimulus: Fortæl om din familie: hvem er de, og hvad laver de?
criteria: Names at least two family members and their relationships
Uses simple verbs to say what they do
Speech is understandable and connected

title: Describe your home
prompt: Describe where you live out loud.

payload.stimulus: Fortæl om dit hjem: bor du i en by eller på landet, og hvordan ser dit hjem ud?
criteria: Describes the type of home and a few rooms
Uses some descriptive adjectives
Speaks for the full time with few long pauses

title: Order at a café
prompt: Role-play ordering food and drink at a café.

payload.stimulus: Du er på en café. Bestil noget at spise og drikke, og spørg om prisen.
criteria: Orders at least one food and one drink politely (jeg vil gerne have)
Asks about the price (hvad koster det)
Uses polite words such as tak

title: Your daily routine
prompt: Talk about a normal day in your life.

payload.stimulus: Fortæl om din dag fra morgen til aften. Hvad laver du, og hvornår?
criteria: Describes several activities across the day
Uses time expressions correctly (om morgenen, klokken)
Verbs are used in the correct present tense

title: Ask for directions
prompt: Ask for directions to a place in town.

payload.stimulus: Du er i en dansk by. Spørg en person om vej til stationen eller supermarkedet.
criteria: Asks politely for directions (undskyld, hvor er)
Names a clear destination
Understands and uses basic direction words (til højre, til venstre, ligeud)

title: Your free time
prompt: Talk about what you like to do in your free time.

payload.stimulus: Fortæl om din fritid: hvad kan du godt lide at lave i weekenden?
criteria: Names at least two free-time activities
Expresses likes (jeg kan godt lide at)
Speaks in connected, understandable sentences
